title: Overall, a really helpful and effective product!
body: The Momcozy collector cups have been a great addition to my pumping routine. They are very comfortable to wear and make pumping much more convenient overall. There are a few different pieces to clean, but once you get the hang of it, the process becomes pretty simple and manageable. I also paired them with my Spectra pump and noticed a significant increase in milk output, which was a huge plus. Overall, a really helpful and effective product!

title: Worth. Every. penny.
body: Best pump ever!! I love this pump so much. I have the spectra 2 and another pump i started with but I almost exclusively use this one. For me I get the same output on the lowest setting( I have sensitive nips and don't go above 1 or 2) I can't stress how great it is to pump and be able to move around(without having to carry anything like the spectra) and I can get everything done. Even when my Little one wants to be held i can pump onw side at a time if need be and carry him on the other side or hip. I get many pumps in before I have to charge them ! Parts are very easy to clean and put together/ take off. Case of perfect for transporting with me. App is easy to use/ change settings/ Ciheck time. Vibrates when full so I don't have to keep looking in my bra. Can't wear this out shopping or anything since I have larger chest and its a little obvious sticking out some but fairly quiet pump.

title: The best on the go spray!
body: LOVE LOVE LOVE this product. Works great while on the go and there is no residue left over. I definatly reccomend this to new moms!

title: Awesome pumps! 😁
body: I have had these pumps for about 4 or 5 days now. I bought them due to the fact that I didn't want to stay hooked up to my Spectra S1 pump. I wanted to be able to get up and move around and do more things. 🙂 So far, these pumps have been outstanding and my output seems better than with my Spectra! 🙂 I have had 0 issues with it so far! 🙂 I have read some reviews on here though saying it has stopped working or whatever after a week or so but I am going to see how it goes! So far, it is fantastic! 🙂

title: BUY THIS PUMP!
body: BUY THIS PUMP!!!! First time mom here so I won’t claim to be an expert, but I was using the Zomee pump prior to this and it was clunky, sometimes painful, and despite pumping twice per day (breastfeeding primarily) I was only squeezing out about 4 oz per day total. Assuming that’s just what my body would produce, I wanted to get a pump that was more portable so I wouldn’t lose time during the day when I needed to leave the house or hold my baby. I’ve had this pump for two days and have already pumped 15 oz and yesterday morning I got 5 ounces in one session!!! I even pumped on the way to the dump today which felt AMAZING and would have been impossible (or at least very weird) using a more traditional wearable pump with tubing. Very pleased. I also really like the app, it helps me track when I’m the most productive and allows control of the suction without having to touch the pumps directly - very discrete if you’re moving about. The only down side is I can’t see how much I’m getting while pumping because they are tucked away, but I can feel when it’s latched well so leaving it a surprise I suppose isn’t a deal breaker - it’s not like looking is going to get more milk 😂 Overall very happy and feeling great that I can finally work on a stash for baby girl. Well worth the money!!

title: I’m loving it so far
body: This pump is making the pumping experience so much easier. I’m able to get so much from a single session. Battery life has been good, I’m getting a few sessions in before I have to charge it. The app could be better but it’s been useful.

title: Vale la pena el producto
body: Excelente producto, muy buena succión y fácil de utilizar, viene con todas las piezas que dice. El envío se demoro menos de los estimado 👌

title: Switched as my daily use ones
body: Absolutely love these! I’m happy I went with the Bluetooth ones You can create your own sessions and they don’t have to be connected to Bluetooth once you’ve set them up The case for them is really nice, it doesn’t take long to fully charge them and I can pump twice a day for a work week and I don’t have to recharge them till the following week. The flanges and the duck bills are a bit stiff at first till you use them more. I don’t understand how people are breaking the plastic pieces on the flanges… you’d have to forcefully pull them to the side for that to happen I originally got these for snowboarding so I could pump while up on the mountain, now they’re my daily use pumps

title: Better than eufy and spectra
body: This is the first pump I ever got and I got sooo much milk from it but everyone was ranting and raving over the spectra so I thought I’d buy it if it’s so great and HATED got almost no milk. Same with the eufy wearables. The grass was not greener lol.

title: Perfect replacement part
body: I purchased this after one of the prongs from my previous flange broke off.
